rationale: A names the version-pinned 4.2 Javadocs and the actual connect/api implementation and test anchors that exist in Kafka, including SchemaBuilderTest and ConnectSchemaTest. B is less accurate: it relies on broader Connect docs, cites an unrelated integration test, and incorrectly claims SchemaBuilder-specific tests were not surfaced even though they exist.

B: Incorrectly says no SchemaBuilder-specific test was surfaced, but Kafka Connect has connect/api/src/test/java/org/apache/kafka/connect/data/SchemaBuilderTest.java and ConnectSchemaTest.java.
Anchors the answer on broad Connect landing/guide pages instead of the version-pinned SchemaBuilder Javadoc and nearby unit tests.
Includes an unrelated ExactlyOnceSourceIntegrationTest citation that does not support SchemaBuilder behavior.
